extraction.one_line_summary: PARET-PEINTRE Aurélien won from 7-rider break formed after 80km, out-sprinting LEKNESSUND Andreas who took maglia rosa as peloton finished 2+ minutes back
tactical_patterns: Soudal Quick-Step deliberately surrendered pink jersey by letting 80km attacks drain peloton before allowing dangerous break containing LEKNESSUND.
UAE Emirates caught napping early with ALMEIDA João in wrong split during attack phase, requiring energy-draining chase back.
EVENEPOEL Remco isolated with 3km remaining on final climb despite leading race, revealing team depth limitations on sustained mountain stages.
Break formation required 80km of attrition before peloton yielded, indicating teams understood stage profile suited escapees over controlled chase.

rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: positive: At 23, took pink jersey from breakaway despite losing sprint, showing GC awareness by securing 3 bonus seconds at intermediate.
rider_signals.PARET-PEINTRE Aurélien: positive: Recovered after being distanced to rejoin LEKNESSUND in final 3km, then proved superior climber-sprinter combination.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Isolated with teammates all dropped inside final kilometers on moderate Category 2 climb, tactical vulnerability exposed.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: Caught in early split during messy breakaway formation phase requiring teammate assistance to regain peloton contact.
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: Led GC group pacing for Ineos despite EVENEPOEL wearing pink, suggesting confidence in isolating rival leader.
